notes: Age brackets: PGG best available age vs Twin age bracket.
Male/female only. PGG uses Prolific sex first, then player-input gender fallback.
Completed-degree harmonization: Twin sub-bachelor levels collapsed to high school vs college/postsecondary.
Coarse race/ethnicity harmonization. Twin Hispanic is folded into other/mixed because Prolific simplified ethnicity lacks a Hispanic bucket.
Employment harmonization uses Twin employment status vs Prolific employment plus student status.
